description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Why choose Green Haven Garden Kneeling Pad? Designed with high-density EVA foam, this kneeling pad offers superior comfort and lasting support. It's water-resistant, lightweight, and built for durability—making it an essential companion for gardening, DIY tasks, or outdoor work. Is the pad firm enough for long-term use without losing shape? Yes, the high-quality EVA foam is engineered for durability. It retains its shape even after repeated use, providing consistent knee support season after season. How thick is the kneeling pad, and does it protect well on rough ground? The pad is approximately 4cm thick, offering excellent protection and shock absorption on concrete, gravel, and other rough outdoor surfaces. What type of foam is used, and how does it support the knees? This kneeling pad is made from high-density EVA foam that cushions and supports your knees, reducing pressure and discomfort even during long periods of kneeling on hard or uneven surfaces.
